name: Herring Salad with Apples, Dill Pickles, And
recipeIngredient: 2 medium tart apples, peeled, cored, and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Lay the herring fillets in a shallow baking dish. Pour the buttermilk over the fish and cover. Refrigerate overnight.
2. The following day, drain and rinse the herring fillets well. Cut into bite-sized pieces and place in a shallow glass or porcelain baking dish.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the sour cream, yogurt, onion, apples, pickles, horseradish, lemon juice, and sugar until well combined. Taste and adjust the seasoning with more lemon juice, sugar, salt, and pepper as needed to achieve a light lemon flavor and balanced tartness.
4. Spoon the dressing over the herring and cover. Refrigerate several hours before serving.
